settings.title: The Hands Behind Every Piece
settings.body: We work directly with artisan cooperatives across India. Every purchase sustains a family, revives a craft, and preserves a living heritage.

settings.name: Rangsutra
settings.bio: A social enterprise empowering over 2,000 rural artisans, primarily women, through traditional embroidery and mirror work.

settings.name: Okhai
settings.bio: Established to provide livelihood opportunities to rural women artisans through traditional embroidery and appliqué work.

settings.name: Khamir
settings.bio: Dedicated to the preservation and promotion of traditional crafts of Kutch, working directly with master craftspeople.

settings.name: Sadhna
settings.bio: A women-led cooperative bringing together traditional patchwork and embroidery artisans from rural Rajasthan.

settings.name: Shantipur Weavers
settings.bio: Master weavers continuing the 500-year legacy of Shantipur's handloom muslin and jamdani traditions.

settings.name: Bishnupur Artisans
settings.bio: Artisan families preserving the ancient Baluchari saree weaving tradition with mythological motifs on silk.

settings.title: Meet Our Artisans
settings.subtitle: Each artisan brings generations of craft knowledge to every piece they create.

settings.name: The Weavers of Shantipur
settings.subtitle: Nadia District, West Bengal — Handloom Muslin
settings.quote: We weave not just cloth, but the stories of our ancestors. Each thread carries five hundred years of tradition.
settings.body:
In the narrow lanes of Shantipur, the rhythmic clatter of wooden looms has been a constant for over five centuries. These master weavers create some of the finest muslin and jamdani fabrics in India — each piece taking days or even weeks to complete.

A Charkha Story works directly with 12 weaving families in Shantipur, ensuring fair wages and creative independence. When you wear our muslin collection, you're wearing a piece of living history.

settings.title: Where Our Crafts Are Born
settings.subtitle: From Kutch to Bengal — tracing the regions behind every piece.

settings.title: Stay Connected
settings.subtitle: Get artisan stories, new collections, and exclusive offers delivered to your inbox.
